appPivotTransaction.notes: Pivot transaction is manually configured; IntegrationId may be NULL. Use unit IDs to verify after import.

notes: ColorwayKey = pdmStyleColorWayMapping.StyleColorID (pdmRGBColor id), NOT slot position.
Host rows must exist before grandchild import (PlmDw_ImportFromDW.sql).
Source grid (Plm_ProductDesignColorGrid) must be populated for pivot column headers.
Skip slot when Colorway_N and Image_N are both NULL.
Skip slot when no pdmStyleColorWayMapping row for (ProductReferenceID, ProductGridBlockID, ColorWayGridColumnID).
